antipattern.description: Caller receives Cohere-specific dict in one path and HuggingFace-specific dict in another.
antipattern.reason: Swap requires upstream code changes. Detector: backend-specific keys appear in results. Fix: r1-one-interface.

antipattern.description: Reranker timing out 50% of the time; pipeline returns 5xx instead of degraded result.
antipattern.reason: Reliability collapses. Detector: 5xx correlated with reranker errors. Fix: r2-circuit-breaker + r5-fallback-flag.

antipattern.description: Single latency_ms reported, no retrieval / rerank split.
antipattern.reason: Bottleneck unidentifiable. Detector: only one latency field. Fix: r4-log-stage-latency.
